defect_or_gate: 57 of 74 sampled selected SVGs need style-contract review under the strict baseline.
standard_to_apply: Add title/desc/role/source-line/min-font gates before chart legibility QA.
acceptance_check: I-0219 audit can separate metadata fixes from true visual design defects.
risk_if_ignored: Unstyled or inaccessible SVGs may pass as attractive drafts but fail production QA.

defect_or_gate: Selected SVGs without source or caveat language should be treated as incomplete even when visually clean.
standard_to_apply: Every final SVG needs a visible source/provenance line and a claim firewall when the topic is rank, cost, safety, adoption, deployment, power, or autonomy.
acceptance_check: Regex scan plus manual caption proximity review.
risk_if_ignored: Charts may silently support broader claims than their sources allow.

defect_or_gate: Small text is acceptable only when it survives print scale.
standard_to_apply: Use 14 px as SVG source warning floor, 17 px preferred for source/caveat text, and 22 px plus for labels.
acceptance_check: I-0219 page-image inspection confirms readability at final figure size.
risk_if_ignored: Beautiful charts become unreadable once placed in the book.

defect_or_gate: Normalize older warm backgrounds and accent colors into the house palette over time.
standard_to_apply: Use ink/paper/rule plus role colors; avoid one-hue blue/purple or marketing-gradient drift.
acceptance_check: Palette scan and grayscale preview before final render.
risk_if_ignored: The book looks assembled from passes rather than designed as one system.

defect_or_gate: I-0221/I-0222 source-card batches must start from the I-0218 card contract.
standard_to_apply: Cards show source band, paraphrase-first body, metadata stack, and blocker footer; direct quotes stay within row limits.
acceptance_check: Quote audit and source-card design check before manifest promotion.
risk_if_ignored: Source texture turns into copyrighted or misleading pull-quote decoration.

defect_or_gate: Use chapter-local figure numbering in page proofs while keeping asset/source IDs in production ledgers.
standard_to_apply: Figure CH.N label maps to selected-100 slot, asset_id, source_ids, caption, and source-note row.
acceptance_check: Join final layout index to I-0216 and I-0217 tables.
risk_if_ignored: Readers see polished figures that production cannot audit.

defect_or_gate: Apply source-surface framing to screenshots, slides, PDF renders, and photos.
standard_to_apply: Crop/access/rights/caveat notes sit with the figure; private-use status stays explicit until cleared.
acceptance_check: I-0220 screenshot QA and later render QA.
risk_if_ignored: Concrete images imply adoption, capacity, market share, power delivery, or current UI claims.

defect_or_gate: Style contract does not close publication readiness.
standard_to_apply: Treat I-0218 as the prerequisite for I-0219/I-0220 and full-book render QA, not as final visual acceptance.
acceptance_check: Scoreboard blockers stay active until page-image proof exists.
risk_if_ignored: A style guide could become a paper shield for unreadable final pages.
